name: playkit-js-youtube

coreResponsibility.description: A YouTube playback engine plugin that integrates YouTube video playback capabilities into the Kaltura PlayKit JS Player ecosystem using the YouTube IFrame API.

featureOwnership: YouTube video playback via IFrame API
YouTube player state management (play, pause, seek, volume)
Video quality/resolution selection and adaptive bitrate switching
Chapter/cue point management for YouTube clips
dataHandling: YouTube player state machine (UNSTARTED, PLAYING, PAUSED, BUFFERING, ENDED, CUED)

upstream.name: @playkit-js/playkit-js
upstream.description: Core player framework providing IEngine interface, EventManager, FakeEventTarget, Tracks, and utilities

upstream.name: @playkit-js/kaltura-player-js
upstream.description: Kaltura Player wrapper providing BasePlugin, registerPlugin, and UI components

upstream.name: YouTube IFrame API
upstream.description: External YouTube API loaded dynamically from https://www.youtube.com/iframe_api

downstream.name: Kaltura Player applications
downstream.description: Any application using Kaltura Player that needs to play YouTube-hosted content

downstream.name: playkit-js-ui
downstream.description: UI layer consumes engine events for controls, progress bar, quality selector

downstream.name: playkit-timeline
downstream.description: Timeline plugin for chapter/cue point visualization with YouTube clips

externalAPIs.name: YouTube IFrame Player API
externalAPIs.usage: Core playback functionality, quality control, captions, playback rate

entryPoints.description: Main entry point - registers YouTube engine and plugin with PlayKit
Core YouTube engine class implementing IEngine interface
YouTube plugin for UI customization and timeline integration

errorPatterns: YouTube video are not played in a playlist
